entities.description: select by entity is a method that targets contiguous document segments by retrieving subtrees rooted at specific section nodes
select by section is a method that targets contiguous document segments by retrieving subtrees rooted at specific section nodes
gt link is a mechanism used to link sections to entities
llm is a system used to select sections in the described process
s target represents a set of target section nodes at a specified depth
n represents the set of nodes in the document structure
e q represents the entities linked to sections via gt link
n s represents the selected node set formed by retrieving descendants of target sections
document is the text being processed by the select by entity and select by section methods
subtree refers to the data structure rooted at specific section nodes that is retrieved by the methods
section node is a specific node within the document structure that serves as a root for subtrees
depth is a specified parameter determining the level of the target section nodes
descendant refers to the nodes below the target section nodes that are retrieved to form the selected node set

relations.description: select by entity identifies a set of target section nodes  s target  as part of its process
select by section identifies a set of target section nodes  s target  as part of its process
s target consists of sections linked to entities  e q  via gt link
s target includes sections selected by the llm
n s is formed by retrieving all descendants of the target section nodes  s target
gt link is the mechanism used to link sections to entities  e q
select by entity targets contiguous segments within the document
select by section targets contiguous segments within the document
select by entity retrieves subtrees rooted at specific section nodes
select by section retrieves subtrees rooted at specific section nodes
s target consists of specific section nodes
s target is defined at a specified depth
n s is formed by retrieving all descendants of the target sections
gt link links sections  nodes  to entities
